info.description: API gateway for Eternal Orbit Labs — authentication, organizations, teams, and app management.
info.title: EOL Gateway API

get.description: Returns a paginated list of apps. Supports cursor-based pagination and search.
Returns a single app by its URL slug.

post.description: Accept a pending organization invite. The user must be the invite recipient.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's organizations and pending invites for the given app.

post.description: Create a new organization under the given app. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

get.description: Returns organization details. Requires the user to be a member.

post.description: Send an invitation to join the organization.

patch.description: Update a pending invite's details (email, name, phone, status).

get.description: Returns a paginated list of organization members with optional filters.

post.description: Add an existing user to the organization by email.

delete.description: Remove a member from the organization. Cannot remove the owner.

patch.description: Activate or deactivate an organization member.

get.description: Returns the sidebar navigation configuration for an organization workspace.
Returns a paginated list of teams in the organization.

post.description: Create a new team in the organization.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of members in the team.

post.description: Add one or more organization members to the team.

delete.description: Remove multiple members from the team in a single request.
Remove a single member from the team.

get.description: Returns all personal API keys for the authenticated user.

post.description: Generate a new personal API key. The raw value is only returned once.

delete.description: Permanently delete a personal API key by ID.

post.description: Change the authenticated user's password. Requires current password (unless the account was created via OAuth).

get.description: Redirects the user to Google's consent screen. Sets an oauth_state cookie for CSRF protection.
Handles the OAuth callback from Google. Validates state, exchanges code for tokens, creates or links user account, sets auth cookies, and redirects to frontend.

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Sets httpOnly auth cookies on success.
Invalidate the current session and clear auth cookies.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's first name and/or last name.

post.description: Exchange the refresh token cookie for a new access token. Rotates the refresh token.
Register a new user with email and password. Sets httpOnly auth cookies on success.

BearerAPIKey.description: Personal API key — send as "Bearer eol_k1_..."
BearerAPIKey.name: Authorization

CookieAuth.description: JWT access token set automatically on login/signup.
CookieAuth.name: eol_access
